title: Implement deepMerge
prompt: Create merge.mjs exporting deepMerge(a, b): plain objects merge recursively (b wins on conflicts), arrays and non-objects are REPLACED by b's value, and neither input is mutated.

grade.command: node -e "import('./merge.mjs').then(m=>{const a={x:{y:1,z:2},list:[1,2],keep:'a'};const b={x:{y:9},list:[3]};const r=m.deepMerge(a,b);if(r.x.y!==9||r.x.z!==2||r.keep!=='a')throw new Error('merge');if(r.list.join(',')!=='3')throw new Error('array replace');if(a.x.y!==1)throw new Error('mutated');console.log('ok')})"
